Name: EntryID
Description: Primary key

Name: BlockEntry
Description: Indicates if subscription is blocked for time cost entry

Name: CancellationDate
Description: Date of cancellation

Name: Classification
Description: Guid ID of classification, to filter the report based on the classification of a subscription

Name: ClassificationCode
Description: Code of classification, to filter the report based on the classification of a subscription

Name: ClassificationDescription
Description: Description of classification, to filter the report based on the classification of a subscription

Name: Created
Description: Date when the subscription was created

Name: Creator
Description: The Guid ID of the user that created the subscription

Name: CreatorFullName
Description: The full name of the user that created the subscription

Name: Currency
Description: Currency code used in the transactions

Name: CustomerPONumber
Description: Purchase order number of that is linked to customer

Name: Description
Description: Description of the subscription

Name: Division
Description: Division number of the company that the subscription is linked to

Name: EndDate
Description: The date and time when the subscription ends

Name: InvoiceDay
Description: For monthly, quaterly, half-year and yearly invoice period, the day number of the month when the invoice of the subscription is sent. While for weekly invoice period, the weekday number of the week when the invoice of the subscription is sent: 0=Monday 1=Tuesday 2=Wednesday 3=Thursday 4=Friday 5=Saturday 6=Sunday

Name: InvoicedTo
Description: The date when the invoice of the subscription is sent

Name: InvoiceTo
Description: The account which the subsciption is invoiced to

Name: InvoiceToContactPerson
Description: The ID of the contact person that is linked to the account the subscription is invoice to

Name: InvoiceToContactPersonFullName
Description: The name of the contact person that is linked to the account the subscription is invoice to

Name: InvoiceToName
Description: Name of the account to invoice to

Name: InvoicingStartDate
Description: Date to start invoicing the account

Name: Modified
Description: Date and time when the subscription has been modified

Name: Modifier
Description: The ID of the user that modified the subscription

Name: ModifierFullName
Description: The name of the user that modified the subscription

Name: Notes
Description: For additional information regarding the subscription

Name: Number
Description: Subscription number of the company

Name: OrderedBy
Description: Reference to order account, GUID ID of the subscriber

Name: OrderedByContactPerson
Description: Reference of contact person of order account, displays the contact name of the subscriber

Name: OrderedByContactPersonFullName
Description: Name of contact person of order account, displays the full contact name of the subscriber

Name: OrderedByName
Description: Name of order account, displays the name of the subscriber

Name: PaymentCondition
Description: Code of subscriptions payment condition

Name: PaymentConditionDescription
Description: Description of subscriptions payment condition

Name: Printed
Description: Indicates if subscription has been printed

Name: Project
Description: The Guid ID of the project, reference to Project endpoint

Name: ReasonCancelled
Description: Guid ID of the reason of cancellation record linked to the subscription

Name: ReasonCancelledCode
Description: Code of the reason of cancellation record linked to the subscription

Name: ReasonCancelledDescription
Description: Description of the reason of cancellation record linked to the subscription

Name: StartDate
Description: Start date of the subscription

Name: SubscriptionLines
Description: Collection of subscription lines linked to the subscription link, can be referenced to SubscriptionLines endpoint

Name: SubscriptionRestrictionEmployees
Description: Collection of employee's restriction, can be referenced to SubscriptionRestrictionEmployees endpoint

Name: SubscriptionRestrictionItems
Description: Collection of restriction items linked to the subscription, can be referenced to SubscriptionRestrictionItems endpoint

Name: SubscriptionType
Description: The GUID ID of the subscription condition, reference to SubscriptionType endpoint

Name: SubscriptionTypeCode
Description: The code of the subscription condition record

Name: SubscriptionTypeDescription
Description: The code of the subscription condition description
